purpose: Multi-layer parallax (2.5D) landing scene — each layer moves at a different speed with the cursor.
model: nano_banana_pro (nano_banana_2), 21:9, 1k (1584x672), reference-locked to control-room.png on main
compositing: All layers share the same canvas and camera. Stack absolutely-positioned, full-bleed, in z-order below. Layer 4 (nearest) is the existing character sprite already driven by the cursor.

layers.contents: Room interior with walls, three island windows, ceiling stars, floor glow — desk and props removed
Console desk with screens, buttons, stickers — background removed (alpha PNG)
Crystal orb, pampas vase, coffee mug — background removed (alpha PNG)
Chibi character back view — already a separate sprite, no generation needed
